name: 自我进化轮巡

notes: Do not hard-code an undocumented AVE endpoint. Put the endpoint template in GitHub Secrets.
If endpoint is absent, workflow preserves cache and can merge output/ave_raw_smart_money.json.

strategy_notes: Do not treat positive Net Buys as Smart Money accumulation without wallet-level confirmation.
If wallet-level data is unavailable, confidence is capped at medium/low.
PVP tokens must be separated from the main bottom-accumulation watchlist.
AVE Smart Money should be refreshed weekly, not hourly.
Main watchlist should stay scarce; use max_main_watchlist to avoid noisy outputs.
Multi-pool tokens must be merged or marked as conflicting before judgment.
v0.2 adds early-alpha range filters so very mature / very large LP tokens do not occupy main watchlist.
v0.2 strengthens symbol-bridge merge between Gecko-only rows and DEXScreener token-address rows to reduce duplicate Token output.
v0.2 keeps a visible PVP risk pool in output so high-noise tokens are monitored separately rather than silently dropped.
v0.3 makes contract address a required output field; if unavailable, mark it explicitly rather than hiding it.
v0.3 adds liquidity tiers: Micro / Early / Liquid / Mature, so candidates at different maturity stages are not mixed blindly.
v0.3 adds visible PVP and mature-pool detail tables, plus needs_chain_verify and emergency_precision_check flags for the next on-chain verification phase.
v0.4 adds BSC/SOL address/account preflight for candidates that need chain verification.
v0.4 adds persistent Smart Wallet Cache structure. AVE Smart Money calls should save wallet addresses, labels, confidence, related tokens and status to output/smart_wallet_cache.json.
v0.4 separates weekly AVE wallet identity refresh from hourly current wallet behavior tracking.
Wallet identities missing from a new AVE refresh should not be blindly deleted; mark stale/expired instead.
v0.5 adds configurable AVE endpoint integration for weekly Smart Wallet refresh. AVE key remains in GitHub Secrets only.
v0.5 writes wallet_behavior_latest.json every hourly run.
v0.5 maps BSC ERC20 Transfer sample wallets to AVE weekly cache hits, but this is not yet full Swap retention confirmation.
Never upgrade confidence to high from Transfer sample alone; require full swap path and holding retention.

chain_verify.solana_rpc_url_note: Use HELIUS_API_KEY secret if available; otherwise public Solana RPC fallback.
notes: v0.5 verifies BSC contract code and SOL token/account existence.
v0.5 adds BSC ERC20 Transfer activity samples for main/emergency candidates.
Transfer samples are not complete swap decoding; v0.6 should parse router path, DEX pair direction, retention and CEX/router outflows.

release_notes: v0.5 adds configurable AVE weekly refresh endpoint support via GitHub Secrets.
Smart Wallet addresses, labels, profiles, confidence, related tokens and risk flags are saved into persistent cache.
Missing wallets from refresh are not deleted; full refresh can mark them stale instead.
Hourly patrol writes wallet_behavior_latest.json and maps BSC Transfer sample wallets to AVE cache hits.
BSC Transfer sample is a pre-confirmation layer, not final Swap retention.
SOL behavior parsing remains signature/account preflight until Helius enhanced transaction parsing is implemented.

wallet_behavior.confidence_rule: Cache hit + transfer sample is medium/low until full swap retention is parsed.
limitations: pair->wallet is only buy-like when pair_address is reliable.
wallet->pair is only sell-like when pair_address is reliable.
SOL full wallet behavior needs Helius enhanced transaction or token balance diff parsing.
